name: Sunday Italian Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Chick peas (garbanzo beans), drained canned
16 oz Can Italian tomatoes, including liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the navy beans with water in a large pot.
2. Heat over medium until just reaching boiling point.
3. Remove from heat and cover; let stand for 1 hour.
4. Drain the beans.
5. Add chicken broth, carrot, and potato to the pot.
6. Cook over medium until vegetables are almost tender, about 35 minutes.
7. Heat oil in a small skillet and sauté onion until tender.
8. Add onion and all remaining ingredients to the soup pot.
9. Cook for an additional 15 minutes or until pasta is cooked.
10. Serve hot.
Food exchanges per serving: 2 STARCH EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE.
CHO: 34g; PRO: 12g; FAT: 4g; CAL: 216;
For low-sodium diets, omit salt and substitute canned vegetables and broth.
